verdict: An outstanding and beautifully crafted Easy chart that perfectly balances physical comfort, rhythmic precision, and creative hold patterns.

issues.problem: The successive jump-holds (tapping one note while holding another) are highly engaging and physically comfortable, but they lean slightly on the upper difficulty limit for an Easy chart.

This step lands on an off-beat (half-beat offset). While it matches the vocal syncopation of the song's outro well, it may momentarily throw off novice players who are relying strictly on the downbeat.
